category_sources: Official renameutils homepage describes programs designed to make renaming files faster and less cumbersome
source_facts.description says tools for file renaming
docs_sources: Official GNU/Nongnu renameutils homepage is the documentation surface and links downloads and usage notes
repo_sources: Official homepage links release archives and Savannah project summary but no official source-control repository URL was confirmed
tags_sources: Official renameutils homepage lists qmv, qcp, imv, icp, and deurlname
